lines.text: Master {PlayerName}! You finally answered!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Do you remember me? It's KU-Key!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: You know, the top assistant of our Master of Cleaning at the Black Shores? Ring any bells?
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: The little robot you've saved so many times…
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Yes, it's me! I knew you wouldn't forget me!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: I'm reaching out because I need your help. Our system detected a frequency almost identical to the Aetherfin's in the Black Shores.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: But the location's still covered in corrupted data and needs some cleaning…
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: And you, Master {PlayerName}, are definitely the best person for the job!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Super cleaner duo, ready to show again! Let's go Aetherfishing, {PlayerName}!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Ku ku ku, the Aetherfin is a legendary Remnant creature that hasn't been seen in two decades!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: But instead of listening to me ramble, how about you come see it for yourself?
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: It's KU-Key, Master {PlayerName}…
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Anyway, I've sent the coordinates to you.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: I'll be waiting there, so don't keep me hanging!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: Yes! We just saved a bunch of Aetherfins!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: No problem! Just leave it to us!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I

lines.text: It is, indeed.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: It's great to finally see what's captured in those pictures.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: Ah… Sorry, I didn't mean to hide this from you.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: This mission was supposed to be a surprise.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: After that crisis, I found some old pictures while cleaning Necrostar's waste data.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: Ah… I forgot to tell you this. Sorry.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: I found them while cleaning Necrostar's waste data. But they're too old to be sourced.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: I saw you in those pictures, gazing at the Aetherfins.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: Whoever took them is... a mystery now.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: But they must be precious to both you and that person.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: Speaking of which, I've always wanted to thank you properly since last time.
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: How about I take a picture of the scenery here for you as a keepsake?
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II

lines.text: The past may be gone, but new stories are always waiting!
lines.quest_name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II
